channel.title: Andy Gonzalez Rivas
channel.description: Essays on society, technology, and the ideas shaping both.

item.title: What Anomie Actually Means — and Why Everyone Gets It Wrong
item.description: Durkheim's concept of anomie is often reduced to chaos or alienation, but it refers to a more specific breakdown of social regulation.

item.title: AI as a Progressive Force: Modernity and Labor Alienation
item.description: Durkheim saw in the division of labor not the destruction of human dignity but its condition. This essay argues that what we are witnessing in AI-driven labor is not the structural verdict of technological development — but its anomic transition.
